title: Manual Can Openers Jar Can Opener,Adjustable Can Opener for Arthritis Stainless Steel Kitchen Gadget Bottle Opener
features: 【High-quality materials】The opener is made of high-quality stainless steel, durable, rust-proof, light and corrosion-resistant,does not lose shape under the influence of enormous force.
【Open the bottle cap】 The evenly spaced gears of the adjustable bottle opener will bite the bottle cap tightly without slipping, saving time and effort.
【Adjustable Design】Adopt an adjustable design to easily cope with all kinds of intricate bottle caps or can lids. This saves you time and effort when opening.
【Humanized handle design】Our can opener uses Humanized handle design，exquisite appearance, smooth grinding, comfortable feel.

【Quality Assurance】If you are not 100% satisfied, we can provide you with a full refund unconditionally. If you encounter any problems during use, please feel free to contact our customer service team.
